title: Single-source critical agents with no fallback — silent partial review looks complete
note: Provider outage causes partial review with no user-visible signal. Different from quality degradation — this is absence of findings that appears as presence.

title: No signal quality monitoring — shallow cheap-model output indistinguishable from deep review
note: A cheap model that is UP but produces thin findings looks like a clean review. Complement to SCM-01 (which covers outage). This covers degraded-but-live operation.

title: Single-source P0 findings from cheap models accepted without verification escalation
note: Hallucinated P0 from cheap model enters synthesis and user-facing output. Erodes trust. Fix: escalation flag on single-source P0 from below-top-tier provider.

title: No post-trade analysis — routing effectiveness unverifiable after shipping
note: Without cost/quality comparison across routing strategies, claimed efficiency gains cannot be measured or improved. Synthesis already has the data — needs one additional output block.

title: Convergence scoring treats all providers equally — cross-family agreement not distinguished
note: Cheap-cheap convergence should score lower than Claude-cheap convergence. Requires provider_family field in findings metadata.
